name_en: M48865 Black and White Pearl Chain/Mini Capucines M10166 Mini bag Imported French calfskin, shiny metal hardware. The distinctive Capucines flap can be tucked inside to display the letter logo or flipped outside to reveal the Monogram Flower pattern. size:21x14x8 cm
